issues.recommendation: Upgrade to stable version when available or migrate to alternative pagination solution
Ensure CSP headers are configured when using PDF.js to prevent XSS via malicious PDFs

best_practices_violations.issue: Using crypto.randomUUID() without fallback for unsupported browsers
best_practices_violations.fix: Add fallback implementation for browsers that don't support crypto.randomUUID()
best_practices_violations.code_snippet: const generateId = () => { if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && crypto.randomUUID) { return crypto.randomUUID(); } return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`; };

best_practices_violations.issue: fetch() API calls without proper timeout handling
best_practices_violations.fix: Use AbortController with timeout for all fetch calls
best_practices_violations.code_snippet: const controller = new AbortController(); const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs); const response = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal }); clearTimeout(timeoutId);

best_practices_violations.issue: Anthropic client initialized without runtime validation of API key format
best_practices_violations.fix: Add API key format validation before client initialization

best_practices_violations.issue: execFile error handling doesn't distinguish between different error types
best_practices_violations.fix: Add structured error classification for execFile failures
best_practices_violations.code_snippet: const classifyExecError = (error) => { if (error.code === 'ENOENT') return 'binary_missing'; if (error.code === 'EACCES') return 'permission_denied'; if (error.killed) return 'timeout'; return 'unknown'; };

positive_findings.finding: strict mode enabled - compliant with Zod requirements
Using defineConfig() with TypeScript - follows Vite best practices
Comprehensive custom error classes with status codes
Proper dotenv configuration at module load time

recommendations.recommendation: Add E2E tests for crypto.randomUUID() fallback path
Add telemetry for agent review latency and success rates
Document environment variable requirements in README
